message: We're using PostgreSQL 14 for the main database.
The database migration tool is Flyway.
Oh actually we switched to golang-migrate last month. Flyway was too heavy.
We upgraded to PostgreSQL 16 during the last maintenance window.
The CI pipeline runs on GitHub Actions.
We have two environments: staging and production.
Actually three — we added a QA environment last quarter for the security team.
What PostgreSQL version are we on?
What migration tool do we use?
How many environments do we have and what are they?
